title: Crispy Tapioca Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry dish made with crispy tapioca pearls, vegetables, and your choice of protein. Serve hot and enjoy!
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 2-3 minutes, until softened.
Add the sliced snow peas and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the crispy tapioca pearls and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Optional: Add protein such as chicken, beef, or pork to the stir fry for added flavor and nutrition.
